name: _MEMORY_WRITE
instruction: Provide new data to write to <memory>

params.new_memory: DICTIONARY Of 'NEW KEYS AND VALUES TO BE ADDED OR UPDATED'

name: _ADD_SCHEDULE
instruction: Add a scheduled reminder or task. limit_channel: [] = all channels. CRITICAL: datetime must be YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM. NEVER put 'in 3 mins' in datetime. For 'in X mins': set relative_minutes to X, omit datetime. type 'reminder': data.message only, omit action/param. type 'action': user wants to RUN a task at a time - set data.action and data.param. Example 'set memory Task to Done in 3 mins': type action, data.action _MEMORY_WRITE, data.param {new_memory:{Task:Done}}, data.message 'Update Task to Done'. Example 'broadcast Hello in 5 mins': type action, data.action _BROADCAST_MSG, data.param {message:Hello,channels:[]}.

params.datetime: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM only. For 'in X mins' leave empty, use relative_minutes
params.relative_minutes: number e.g. 3 for 'in 3 mins'. Required when user says 'in X minutes'

data.action: string (only when type is action, e.g. _MEMORY_WRITE, _BROADCAST_MSG)
data.param: object (only when type is action, params for that action)

name: _DELETE_SCHEDULE
instruction: Remove scheduled reminder(s). Use when user wants to cancel, delete, or remove a reminder. Match by datetime and/or message (message is substring match, case-insensitive). At least one of datetime or message required. datetime: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM.

name: _BROADCAST_MSG
instruction: Broadcast a message to channels. Use when user wants to send or announce a message to Console, Telegram, or all. channels: [] = all channels; otherwise list channel names (Console, Telegram).

name: _BROWSER_VISION
instruction: Use this for ANY request to see, read, or get information from a website (including headlines, news, or summaries).

name: _LLM_SUMMARY
instruction: Use this for ANY request to summarize any text or content in the artifact.

params.content: path to content file from artifact
